title: Prenoiser
description: Prenoiser allow pre generate noise outside of area full render distance.
body:
{-} RECOMMENDED USING C2ME OPENCL ACCELERATION.

BUILD IN ALPHA.

Prenoiser generate noise where outside of render distance.
Using C2ME OpenCL allow generate noises more faster, making cut time of CPU waiting for noises.

This mod DOESN'T affect vanilla noise system and chunk.

To see illustration, see in gallery.

This mod has custom command it's "/prenoise", arguments: "extendrange (0-128), status, noiseculling (true|false), cullingtype (split|front). required OP level 2.

Default prenoise extend range : 8 chunks with render distance.

If you see any progress noise like NCPS, Generated and Est Time looks not working, yes it's broken.

You can disable this prenoise by extendrange set 0.

Also pre noises can impact CPU usage while GPU compute noises. because CPU need to remap noises, calcuate range, or etc.
